nasb.text: They celebrated the Feast of Booths, as it is written, and offered the fixed number of burnt offerings daily, according to the ordinance, as each day required;

esv.text: And they kept the Feast of Booths, as it is written, and offered the daily burnt offerings by number according to the rule, as each day required,

cnv.text: 他們又按照律法上所記載的守住棚節，每天照著規定的數目獻上當天的燔祭。

ccb.text: 他们照律法书的记载守住棚节，每天按规定的数目献上燔祭。
